name: useDisclosure
description: Hook that allows you to open and close a modal
examples: const { opened, open, close, toggle } = useDisclosure();

parameters.name: initialValue
parameters.description: The initial value of the component

source.source: * @param {boolean} [initialValue=false] The initial value of the component

tokens.name: [initialValue=false]
tokens.description: The initial value of the component

parameters.name: options.onOpen
parameters.description: The callback function to be invoked on open

source.source: * @param {() => void} [options.onOpen] The callback function to be invoked on open

tokens.name: [options.onOpen]
tokens.description: The callback function to be invoked on open

parameters.name: options.onClose
parameters.description: The callback function to be invoked on close

source.source: * @param {() => void} [options.onClose] The callback function to be invoked on close

tokens.name: [options.onClose]
tokens.description: The callback function to be invoked on close

returns.name: An
returns.description: object with the opened, open, close, and toggle properties

source.source: * @returns {UseDisclosureReturn} An object with the opened, open, close, and toggle properties
